product_overview: A static marketing website (landing page + blog) for Private Car Tours Da Nang that helps visitors discover tours, read reviews and blog previews, and convert into direct contact through multiple channels (Zalo, WhatsApp, Messenger, Gmail, phone). The site supports Vietnamese and English and provides tour details, itineraries, an inquiry form, and contact widgets to drive leads.
core_goals: Allow visitors to discover available private car tours and read high-level details and itineraries
Enable visitors to switch the site language (VI / EN) and have that preference persist
Make it easy for visitors to contact the operator via multiple direct channels (Zalo, WhatsApp, Messenger, Gmail, phone) and via an on-site inquiry form
Build trust by surfacing customer testimonials, company stats, and FAQs
Provide a lightweight blog listing to surface travel guides and encourage contact

features.name: Navigation
features.description: Sticky, responsive navigation that lets users move through sections, toggle language, open the mobile menu, and launch the contact modal from any view.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Click menu links to scroll to page sections -> Use language toggle in the navbar to change site language -> Click CTA to open the contact modal
Navigate to /index.html on a small viewport -> Click hamburger icon to open mobile menu -> Click a mobile menu item to navigate to a section and auto-close the menu

features.name: Language Switcher
features.description: Toggle the site text between Vietnamese and English with the selected language stored for subsequent visits.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Click EN button to switch to English -> Observe all page text update to the selected language -> Reload the page -> Observe language preference persists
Navigate to /index.html -> Click VI button to switch to Vietnamese -> Observe all page text update to Vietnamese

features.name: Hero Slideshow
features.description: Auto-rotating hero background showcasing main destinations that orients visitors to key offerings and invites conversion.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> View auto-rotating hero background images changing approximately every 5 seconds -> Use hero CTA to either open the contact modal or scroll to the tours section

features.name: Tour Cards with Accordion
features.description: A set of tour cards presenting highlights, pricing, and an expandable itinerary so users can read day-by-day plans before enquiring.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> View tour cards with images, highlights, and pricing -> Open a tour's itinerary accordion to read the itinerary details -> Close the itinerary accordion
Navigate to /index.html -> View a tour of interest -> Use the tour's contact CTA to open the contact modal

features.name: Reviews Slider
features.description: Customer testimonial slider that lets visitors browse reviews from different countries to build social proof.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> View customer reviews in the slider autoplay -> Click prev/next controls to navigate between review slides -> Click slider dots to jump to a specific slide

features.name: Contact Form
features.description: Client-side inquiry form for collecting visitor name, phone, email, tour interest, group size, date and notes; shows a local success message on submit.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Fill in full name (required) -> Fill in phone number (required) -> Fill in email (optional) -> Select tour of interest from dropdown -> Enter number of people (required) -> Select expected date (required) -> Add additional notes (optional) -> Submit contact form -> See success message after submission
Navigate to /index.html -> Leave required fields blank and submit the form -> See HTML5 validation prevent submission and display validation feedback

features.name: FAQ Accordion
features.description: Expandable list of common questions where only one answer is visible at a time to help users get quick answers.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Click on a question to expand and show the answer -> Click a different question to expand it and automatically collapse the previously open answer -> Click the open question to collapse its answer

features.name: Contact Modal
features.description: Full-screen modal that surfaces quick contact channel choices so users can start conversations in their preferred channel.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Click any CTA that opens the contact modal -> Click Zalo to open Zalo chat -> Dismiss the modal by closing it or clicking the overlay
Navigate to /index.html -> Open the contact modal -> Click WhatsApp to open WhatsApp -> Open the contact modal -> Click Gmail to open an email composer

features.name: Contact Sidebar
features.description: Always-visible right-side contact panel providing quick access to Zalo, WhatsApp, Messenger, Gmail and phone so visitors can contact without leaving the page.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Hover over sidebar icons to reveal labels -> Click Zalo icon to open Zalo chat -> Click Phone icon to initiate a call

features.name: Animated Counters
features.description: Counters in the About section that animate from zero to target values when scrolled into view to convey company scale and credibility.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Scroll to the About Us section to trigger count-up animation -> Observe counters animate from 0 to their target values

features.name: Blog Page
features.description: A blog listing page that surfaces travel guides and drives visitors back to contact; detail pages are currently placeholders.
user_flows: Navigate to /blog.html -> View blog article cards in a grid layout -> Click an article card to open its placeholder link and observe there is no full article detail yet
Navigate to /blog.html -> Click the CTA card to go to the contact section -> Navigate to /index.html -> Observe the contact section to start an enquiry

routes.description: Main landing page with hero, about, tours, reviews, contact, FAQ, and blog preview sections
Blog listing page with travel guide articles

features.name: Navigation
features.description: Sticky navbar with menu links, language toggle, CTA button, and hamburger mobile menu
user_interactions: Click menu links to scroll to page sections
Click hamburger icon to open mobile menu
Click menu item in mobile menu to navigate and auto-close menu
Click CTA button to open contact modal

features.name: Language Switcher
features.description: Toggle between Vietnamese and English languages with full page translation
user_interactions: Click VI button to switch to Vietnamese
Click EN button to switch to English
All page text updates to selected language
Language preference saved in localStorage

features.name: Hero Slideshow
features.description: Auto-rotating background image slideshow with 5 tour destination images
user_interactions: View auto-rotating hero background images every 5 seconds
Click CTA buttons to open contact modal or scroll to tours section

features.name: Tour Cards with Accordion
features.description: 6 tour cards showing tour details with expandable itinerary accordion
user_interactions: View tour cards with images, highlights, and pricing
Click "Xem lich trinh" button to expand/collapse itinerary accordion
Click "Hoi ngay" button to open contact modal

features.name: Reviews Slider
features.description: Customer testimonials slider with navigation controls
user_interactions: View customer reviews from multiple countries
Click prev/next buttons to navigate between review slides
Click slider dots to jump to specific slide

features.name: Contact Form
features.description: Inquiry form with fields for name, phone, email, tour interest, group size, date, and notes
user_interactions: Fill in full name (required)
Fill in phone number (required)
Fill in email (optional)
Select tour of interest from dropdown
Enter number of people (required)
Select expected date (required)
Add additional notes (optional)
Click submit button
See success message after submission

features.name: FAQ Accordion
features.description: 8 frequently asked questions with expand/collapse functionality
user_interactions: Click on a question to expand and show the answer
Click again to collapse the answer
Only one FAQ can be open at a time

features.name: Contact Modal
features.description: Popup modal with quick links to Zalo, WhatsApp, Messenger, and Gmail
user_interactions: Click any CTA button with data-open-modal attribute to open modal
Click Zalo button to open Zalo chat
Click WhatsApp button to open WhatsApp
Click Messenger button to open Facebook Messenger
Click Gmail button to open email
Click close button or overlay to dismiss modal

features.name: Contact Sidebar
features.description: Always-visible contact sidebar on the right side with quick access to all contact channels
user_interactions: Hover over sidebar icons to see labels expand
Click Zalo icon to open Zalo
Click WhatsApp icon to open WhatsApp
Click Messenger icon to open Messenger
Click Gmail icon to open email
Click Phone icon to initiate call

features.name: Animated Counters
features.description: Counter animation in About Us section showing statistics when scrolled into view
user_interactions: Scroll to About Us section to trigger count-up animation
See numbers animate from 0 to target values (8 years, 1000 customers, 500 destinations, 4.9 rating)

features.name: Blog Page
features.description: Blog listing page with article cards and CTA
user_interactions: View blog article cards in grid layout
Click article card to read more (placeholder links)
Click CTA card to go to contact section

known_limitations.issue: Blog article detail pages do not exist yet, all blog links point to
known_limitations.impact: Users cannot read full blog articles

known_limitations.issue: Contact form has no backend integration, form submission only shows success message locally
known_limitations.impact: Form data is not sent to any server or email

known_limitations.issue: Blog page does not have language toggle functionality
known_limitations.impact: Blog page content remains in Vietnamese only
